feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.task_description: Fix hardcoded slot names in mcp-restart.md and mcp-set-model.md: replace hardcoded allowed-tools (mcp__claude-1..6__identity) and hardcoded slot lists (codex-cli-1, gemini-cli-1, opencode-1, copilot-1, claude-1..6) with dynamic reads from ~/.claude.json mcpServers, and add ccr-1..6 and opencode-2 to allowed-tools
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.approach: Replace hardcoded agent lists in mcp-restart.md and mcp-set-model.md with dynamic reads from ~/.claude.json mcpServers, dynamically generate allowed-tools from mcpServers, and add ccr-1..6 and opencode-2 to the allowed-tools list.
out_of_scope: Fix hardcoded agent lists in other MCP commands (e.g., mcp-status.md, mcp-repair.md)
Modify the node scripts that read ~/.claude.json (they already work correctly)
Change the command output format or user-facing messages beyond agent list display
Add new validation rules or error handling beyond current scope
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.risk_reason: Task involves modifying two workflow command files with hardcoded values that affect CLI behavior and tool integration, requiring dynamic configuration reading from user files.
